starter.audience: Trying the commercial surface: sign in, explore, and compare with the OSS build from source.
starter.valueUnlock: Evaluation only on the commercial path—licensed npm verify and enforce require a paid subscription. Use the default OSS build from this repo for free contract verify without a subscription.

individual.audience: Solo developers and early adopters who need licensed npm verify and CI enforcement without team-scale volume.
individual.valueUnlock: Licensed contract and quick verify with monthly quota; CI locks and enforce under the same active subscription.

team.audience: Small teams running licensed verification in production CI or staging with steady volume.
team.valueUnlock: Higher monthly quota for multi-repo or multi-service pipelines; same subscription covers enforce and CI lock flows.

business.audience: Larger pipelines or multiple services needing headroom and predictable billing.
business.valueUnlock: Highest licensed verify limits; CI locks and enforce included under the same subscription.

enterprise.audience: Organizations needing custom limits, terms, or procurement.
